commit.subject: LU-19769 compat: remove cfs_stack_trace_save_task
commit.message:
LU-19769 compat: remove cfs_stack_trace_save_task

With the cleanup involving sched_show_task() landed we can remove
cfs_stack_trace_save_task() handling.

Test-Parameters: trivial
Signed-off-by: James Simmons <jsimmons@infradead.org>
Change-Id: Id45d6251136850e8d8a550c7ed34aef08dfcedc9
Reviewed-on: https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/61411
Reviewed-by: Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>
Tested-by: Maloo <maloo@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Shaun Tancheff <shaun.tancheff@hpe.com>
Reviewed-by: Arshad Hussain <arshad.hussain@aeoncomputing.com>
Reviewed-by: Timothy Day <timday@amazon.com>
Tested-by: jenkins <devops@whamcloud.com>
